title: morocarpus ceylanicus
intro: Morocarpus ceylanicus, a plant native to Sri Lanka, is commonly known as the Sri Lankan Ashwagandha or Indian Ashwagandha, and is classified as a shrub with medicinal properties. The plant is known for its adaptogenic properties, which help in reducing stress and anxiety by regulating the body's response to stress. The health benefits of Morocarpus ceylanicus include improving sleep quality, enhancing cognitive function, and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as capsules and teas, are used to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
